public static long solve(long[][] grid, long k) {

    int m = grid.length;

    int n = grid[0].length;

    // Precompute teleportable list

    List<int[]>[] teleportable = new List[m][n];

    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {

        for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {

            teleportable[i][j] = new ArrayList<>();

            for (int x = 0; x < m; x++) {

                for (int y = 0; y < n; y++) {

                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {

                        teleportable[i][j].add(new int[]{x, y});

                    }

                }

            }

        }

    }

    // Dijkstra's algorithm

    long[][][] dist = new long[m][n][k+1];

    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {

        for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {

            for (int t = 0; t <= k; t++) {

                dist[i][j][t] = Long.MAX_VALUE;

            }

        }

    }

    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    PriorityQueue<long[]> pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> Long.compare(a[0], b[0]));

    pq.offer(new long[]{0, 0, 0, 0});

    while (!pq.isEmpty()) {

        long[] current = pq.poll();

        long cost = current[0];

        int i = current[1];

        int j = current[2];

        int t = current[3];

        // Check if we reached the destination

        if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) {

            return cost;

        }

        // Regular moves

        // Right

        if (j + 1 < n) {

            long newCost = cost + grid[i][j+1];

            if (newCost < dist[i][j+1][t]) {

                dist[i][j+1][t] = newCost;

                pq.offer(new long[]{newCost, i, j+1, t});

            }

        }

        // Down

        if (i + 1 < m) {

            long newCost = cost + grid[i+1][j];

            if (newCost < dist[i+1][j][t]) {

                dist[i+1][j][t] = newCost;

                pq.offer(new long[]{newCost, i+1, j, t});

            }

        }

        // Teleportation

        if (t < k) {

            for (int[] xy : teleportable[i][j]) {

                int x = xy[0];

                int y = xy[1];

                long newCost = cost;

                if (newCost < dist[x][y][t+1]) {

                    dist[x][y][t+1] = newCost;

                    pq.offer(new long[]{newCost, x, y, t+1});

                }

            }

        }

    }

    // If not found (should not happen)

    return -1;

}

public static long solve(long[][] grid, long k) {

    int m = grid.length;
    int n = grid[0].length;

    // Preprocess teleportList
    List<int[]>[] teleportList = new List[m][n];
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {
            teleportList[i][j] = new ArrayList<>();
            for (int x = 0; x < m; x++) {
                for (int y = 0; y < n; y++) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        teleportList[i][j].add(new int[]{x, y});
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Dijkstra's algorithm
    long[][][] dist = new long[m][n][k+1];
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {
            for (int t = 0; t <= k; t++) {
                dist[i][j][t] = Long.MAX_VALUE;
            }
        }
    }
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    PriorityQueue<long[]> pq = new PriorityQueue<>(Comparator.comparingLong(a -> a[0]));
    pq.offer(new long[]{0, 0, 0, 0});

    while (!pq.isEmpty()) {
        long cost = pq.peek()[0];
        int i = pq.peek()[1];
        int j = pq.peek()[2];
        int t = pq.peek()[3];
        pq.poll();

        if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) {
            return cost;
        }

        // Regular moves
        if (j+1 < n) {
            long newCost = cost + grid[i][j+1];
            if (newCost < dist[i][j+1][t]) {
                dist[i][j+1][t] = newCost;
                pq.offer(new long[]{newCost, i, j+1, t});
            }
        }
        if (i+1 < m) {
            long newCost = cost + grid[i+1][j];
            if (newCost < dist[i+1][j][t]) {
                dist[i+1][j][t] = newCost;
                pq.offer(new long[]{newCost, i+1, j, t});
            }
        }

        // Teleportation
        if (t < k) {
            for (int[] xy : teleportList[i][j]) {
                int x = xy[0];
                int y = xy[1];
                if (dist[x][y][t+1] > cost) {
                    dist[x][y][t+1] = cost;
                    pq.offer(new long[]{cost, x, y, t+1});
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return dist[m-1][n-1][k];
}

            [this.heap[parentIndex], this.heap[index]] = [this.heap[index], this.heap[parentIndex]];
            index = parentIndex;

            [this.heap[index], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[index]];
            index = smallest;
        }
    }
    isEmpty() {

function solve(grid, k) {
    const m = grid.length;
    const n = grid[0].length;
    const dist = new Array(m).fill().map(() => new Array(n).fill().map(() => new Array(k+1).fill(Infinity)));
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    // Priority queue: min-heap
    const heap = [];
    heap.push([0, 0, 0, 0]);

    // Directions for regular moves: right and down
    const dirs = [[0, 1], [1, 0]];

    while (heap.length > 0) {
        // Pop the element with the smallest cost
        heap.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
        const [cost, i, j, t] = heap.shift();

        // If we have reached the destination
        if (i === m-1 && j === n-1) {
            return cost;
        }

        // If the current cost is higher than the stored distance, skip
        if (cost > dist[i][j][t]) {
            continue;
        }

        // Process regular moves
        for (const [di, dj] of dirs) {
            const ni = i + di;
            const nj = j + dj;
            if (ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n) {
                const new_cost = cost + grid[ni][nj];
                if (new_cost < dist[ni][nj][t]) {
                    dist[ni][nj][t] = new_cost;
                    heap.push([new_cost, ni, nj, t]);
                }
            }
        }

        // Process teleportation
        if (t < k) {
            // Iterate all cells (x, y) in grid
            for (let x = 0; x < m; x++) {
                for (let y = 0; y < n; y++) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        const new_t = t + 1;
                        if (cost < dist[x][y][new_t]) {
                            dist[x][y][new_t] = cost;
                            heap.push([cost, x, y, new_t]);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // If not found (should not happen)
    return -1;
}

class PriorityQueue {
    constructor() {
        this.heap = [];
    }
    push(value) {
        this.heap.push(value);
        this.heapifyUp(this.heap.length - 1);
    }
    pop() {
        if (this.heap.length === 0) return null;
        const result = this.heap[0];
        this.heap[0] = this.heap.pop();
        this.heapifyDown(0);
        return result;
    }
    heapifyUp(index) {
        while (index > 0) {
            const parentIndex = Math.floor((index - 1) / 2);
            if (this.heap[parentIndex][0] <= this.heap[index][0]) break;
            [this.heap[parentIndex], this.heap[index]] = [this.heap[index], this.heap[parentIndex]];
            index = parentIndex;
        }
    }
    heapifyDown(index) {
        const length = this.heap.length;
        while (index < length) {
            const left = 2 * index + 1;
            const right = 2 * index + 2;
            let smallest = index;
            if (left < length && this.heap[left][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) smallest = left;
            if (right < length && this.heap[right][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) smallest = right;
            if (smallest === index) break;
            [this.heap[index], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[index]];
            index = smallest;
        }
    }
    isEmpty() {
        return this.heap.length === 0;
    }
}
